prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约3049→1790→5724→1545→4284名，波动剧烈，近3年呈现\"骤降-回升-再降\"的震荡格局；2025年基准约4284名，较2024年大幅后移约2739名；2021–2025年物理类计划数分别为58、58、59、44、53人，2026年大幅扩招至89人，较2025年增加36人（+68%），扩招幅度显著，竞争加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第15名，近年排名稳定在Top20，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2021年曾因校园安全事件获偏负面评价，2023年因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，但均为短期舆情；抖音热度排名第31（较热），短视频平台曝光度较高，对考生关注度有正向作用；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达18个，其中A+学科5个（交通运输工程、土木工程、建筑学、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A学科3个（仪器科学与技术、信息与通信工程、城乡规划学、风景园林学），A-学科9个；工科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息类、计算机类等东南大学核心招生专业社会热度持续高热；贵州省2026年高考总人数约29.9万，物理类估算约20.8万人，较2025年略有增加，竞争略加剧；东南大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，地域吸引力强；该校在贵州省招生占比约1.5%–2%，属外省招生比例正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4284名、2026年大幅扩招68%带来的竞争加剧效应、学校顶尖层次与优势学科的强吸引力、贵州省考生总数小幅增加等因素。扩招幅度虽大，但学校层次和学科优势对高分考生的吸引力可部分对冲扩招影响，预计2026年最低位次约6030名，区间5530–6530名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班）
- 未来机器人（未来技术班）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 电子信息类（信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
- 工科试验班（AI+工程创新班）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智慧建造与智能交通）
- 建筑类（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
- 理科试验班（数学与应用数学等）
- 临床医学类（临床医学、医学影像学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5530–6530名内，建议以二档专业为主力（计算机类、AI+工程创新班、集成电路），一档专业（吴健雄班、未来机器人、电气、电子信息）作为冲刺，三档专业（智慧建造、建筑类、理科试验班）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<5530名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。东南大学工科实力极强，建议优先选择电子信息、电气、计算机等热门工科方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3049 → 1790 → 5724 → 1545 → 4284, showing drastic fluctuations, with a pattern of 'sharp drop - rebound - drop again' in recent three years; the 2025 baseline is about 4284, significantly moving back by about 2739 positions compared to 2024; enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 58, 58, 59, 44, and 53 respectively, with a substantial expansion to 89 in 2026, an increase of 36 (+68%) compared to 2025, indicating significant expansion and intensified competition, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; received somewhat negative evaluations in 2021 due to a campus safety incident and in 2023 due to a teacher ethics incident, but both were short-term public opinion; ranked 31st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, positively influencing candidate attention; no significant record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 3 A disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture), and 9 A- disciplines; its engineering strength is extremely prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Southeast University, such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information, and Computer Science, continue to be highly popular in society; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 208,000 in the Physics Category, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; its enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.5%–2%, which is normal for an out-of-province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4284, the intensified competition effect from the 68% expansion in 2026, the strong appeal of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province, although the expansion is large, the university's level and disciplinary advantages can partially offset the expansion's impact on high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 6030, with a range of 5530–6530.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Future Robotics (Future Technology Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI + Engineering Innovation Class)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Intelligent Transportation)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.)
- Clinical Medicine (Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5530–6530, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, AI + Engineering Innovation Class, Integrated Circuits), use Tier 1 majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Future Robotics, Electrical, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Smart Construction, Architecture, Science Experimental Class) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5530), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. Southeast University has extremely strong engineering capabilities, so it is recommended to prioritize popular engineering directions such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2024 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1136 → 1033, with a slight upward trend of about 103 positions over the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1033; the planned enrollment numbers for History Category in 2024–2025 were 15 and 10 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 10, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities; received negative evaluations in 2021 due to a campus safety incident and in 2023 due to a teacher ethics incident, but these were short-term public opinions; Douyin popularity ranking 31st (relatively hot), with overall high attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 18 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Law A- and Management Science and Engineering A-, which are related to liberal arts enrollment majors, indicating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Digital Economy and Intelligent Management) covers majors such as Accounting and Finance, with high social popularity for Accounting/Finance/Auditing, and divided opinions on Finance/Economics/Economy; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 90,600 in the History Category, basically unchanged from 2025; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province's History Category is very small, which is normal for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1033, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the slight upward trend in rankings over the past two years, and the university's top-tier level and disciplinary advantages. With no change in plan and an upward trend in rankings, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1023, with a range of 905–1141.
